design.decision_cadence: daily for stop/cross exits (a hit stop must not ride for days), weekly for the TSMOM carry-over (EV1 parity); rebalance band 0.5% of equity suppresses dust
design.exit_variants: channel (Donchian), signal-off, ATR/chandelier trailing stop (2.8 x ATR14 from highest close since entry; re-entry requires a fresh signal)

families.donchian: Turtle long-only: enter on prior 20/55-day-high close breakout; exit on prior 10/20-day-low close (channel) or chandelier 2.8x ATR(14) trail
families.ensemble: majority (>=3 of 5) and average (fractional strength) of one fixed canonical member per family
families.ma_cross: dual SMA, long while SMA_short > SMA_long; short in {10,20,30} x long in {50,100,200}; canonical 20x100 also gets the ATR-trail exit
families.mtf: daily trailing-return sign (30/60/90d) gated by the weekly sign (8-week lookback, frozen at completed 7-day blocks); canonical 60d also gets the ATR-trail exit
families.tsmom: the EV1 signal carried over verbatim (sign of trailing 30/60/90d return, long_only mode, weekly cadence) — apples-to-apples

design.fills: closed-candle decisions, next-candle-open fills, EXEC-EV1 depth-aware friction at traded notional

sizing_variants.equal_dollar: non-vol-targeted: strength/N per asset, same documented gross cap 1.5x
sizing_variants.vol_targeted: EV1 style: equal risk budget 0.20/N, per-asset weight cap 0.40, gross cap 1.5x

hindsight_best_oos_config_not_a_verdict.note: best OOS Sharpe across the grid IN HINDSIGHT; it was not train-chosen, so it is surfaced for honesty, never as a verdict

question_2_did_removing_vol_targeting_un.reading: see vol_targeting_comparison: pairwise OOS effect of removing the vol cap for every signal cell; counts above aggregate the deterministic classifications. The full-window counter shows how often the uncapped variant DID capture more bull-window upside in-sample — upside the OOS bear then took back

train_only_choice.criterion: best train-window Sharpe under conservative friction

universe.rationale: Same eight liquid majors as TSMOM-EV1 (full 889-candle 1d history, EXEC-EV1 major/large tiers; HYPE excluded: mid-alt tier, ~550 candles). Hyperliquid candles are valid trend inputs for liquid majors (price is fungible across venues); multi-venue history is queued as DATA1.
